title: Better Looms
description: Mod to improve client-side loom GUI
body: minecraft mod that improves on banner GUI. Use Mod Menu to configure, or modify minecraft/config/better-looms.json - clicking on colours moves dye into appropriate slot. - clicking on banner pattern automatically completes the pattern, brings the output back into the input slot - clicking on "blank" pattern brings in a blank banner of that colour. - also supports keyboard input - using https://banner-writer.web.app/keylayout.png as the default layout (off by default) - supports creation of banners with 6 or more patterns (disabled by default) Please feel free to give feedback/requests/bug reports [here](https://github.com/FridayFaerie/better-looms/issues) (this mod was made with [ClongCraft](https://linktr.ee/ClongCraft) in mind - we apparently use banners there)
